channel.title: MonTransit
channel.description: Latest news about the MonTransit app

item.title: Last Month in MonTransit
item.description: enabledрҹҶ• real-timeрҹӣ°пёҸ vehicleрҹҡҚрҹҡҠрҹҡҮ locations in stop/station & route direction screens mapsрҹ—әпёҸ, 196 schedule updatesрҹ”ҒвҖҰ

item.title: Last Month in MonTransit
item.description: addedрҹҶ• route directionвһЎпёҸ stops nearby current stopрҹҡҸ on the mapрҹ—әпёҸ to provide more contextрҹ‘Ң, 179 schedule updatesрҹ”ҒвҖҰ

item.title: Last Month in MonTransit
item.description: minor improvement to avoid static dataрҹ—ғпёҸ corruptionвӣ“пёҸвҖҚрҹ’Ҙ during minificationрҹ—ңпёҸ, 232 schedule updatesрҹ”ҒвҖҰ

item.title: Last Month in MonTransit
item.description: multiple small UIвңЁ changes (in Favorites screenвҖҰ), increased static informationрҹ—ғпёҸ for compatibility with upcoming real-timeрҹӣ°пёҸ features, 182 schedule updatesрҹ”ҒвҖҰ

item.title: Last Month in MonTransit
item.description: route service updatesв„№пёҸвҡ пёҸ UI improvementsвңЁ, more icons to access faresрҹ’ірҹҺҹпёҸ, 183 schedule updatesрҹ”ҒвҖҰ

item.title: Last Month in MonTransit
item.description: Twitter/Xрҹ“° and YouTubeрҹ“ә news providers improvementsвңЁ, getting ready for newрҹҶ• exo/RTL/STS real-timeрҹӣ°пёҸ ChronoвҡңпёҸ API, 188 schedule updatesрҹ”ҒвҖҰ

item.title: Last Month in MonTransit
item.description: added рҹҺҹпёҸfares/pricingрҹ’І informationв„№пёҸ, moved button to add/edit/remove to favoritesвӯҗ, better errorрҹҷҒ screens, 192 schedule updatesрҹ”ҒвҖҰ

item.title: Last Month in MonTransit
item.description: better compatibility with long network closuresрҹҳһ in schedulesрҹ—“пёҸ #REMMtl, 199 schedule updatesрҹ”ҒвҖҰ

item.title: Last Month in MonTransit
item.description: addedрҹҶ• Williams Lake Transit busesрҹҡҢ, compatibility with new Winnipeg Transit APIрҹ”Җ, better app newsрҹ“°, 179 schedule updatesрҹ”ҒвҖҰ

item.title: Last Month in MonTransit
item.description: always show timesвҢҡ in localрҹ“Қ time-zone instead of deviceрҹ“ұ time-zone, 163 schedule updatesрҹ”ҒвҖҰ

item.title: Last Month in MonTransit
item.description: making it easier & fasterрҹҡ„ to add newрҹҶ• transit agencies (WIP)рҹ”„, 271 schedule updatesрҹ”ҒвҖҰ

item.title: Last Month in MonTransit
item.description: improvements to latest newsрҹ“° loading and text searchрҹ”Қ user interface, 154 schedule updatesрҹ”ҒвҖҰ

item.title: Last Month in MonTransit
item.description: fixed bugрҹҗӣ with Edge-to-Edge UI on Android 7-10, 131 schedule updatesрҹ”ҒвҖҰ

item.title: Last Month in MonTransit
item.description: bug fixes & performance improvements, 218 schedule updatesрҹ”ҒвҖҰ

item.title: Last Month in MonTransit
item.description: full compatibility with Android 15 Vanilla Ice CreamрҹҚҰ including Edge-to-EdgeвҶ•пёҸ UIвңЁ, newsрҹ“° videoрҹ“ә player, 217 schedule updatesрҹ”ҒвҖҰ

item.title: Last Month in MonTransit
item.description: added real-timeрҹӣ°пёҸ service alertsвҡ пёҸв„№пёҸ to GO Transit рҹҡҚрҹҡҶ & UP ExpressрҹҡҶ, newsрҹ“° to BC TransitрҹҡҚ, 145 schedule updatesрҹ”ҒвҖҰ

item.title: Last Month in MonTransit
item.description: initial compatibility with Android 15 Vanilla Ice CreamрҹҚҰ, 173 schedule updatesрҹ”ҒвҖҰ

item.title: Last Month in MonTransit
item.description: new dots UI рҹҹҰрҹҹҘрҹҹ©в¬ң for bikeрҹҡІ stations availability, lessв¬ҮпёҸ annoyingрҹҳ– "new schedule available" promptsрҹ’¬, 198 schedule updatesрҹ”ҒвҖҰ

item.title: Last Month in MonTransit
item.description: reached 1M+ downloadsв¬ҮпёҸ on Google Play Store!рҹ’ҡ, better nearbyрҹҺҜ connectionsрҹ”Җ in stop/station screen #UserRequest, improved real timeрҹӣ°пёҸ service alerts severityв„№пёҸвҡ пёҸ and data updates reliabilityрҹҰҫ, 252 schedule updatesрҹ”ҒвҖҰ

item.title: Last Month in MonTransit
item.description: fasterрҹ’Ё & more secureрҹ”‘ data updates (also ignore insignificantрҹӨҸ data changes), 283 schedule updatesрҹ”ҒвҖҰ

item.title: Last Month in MonTransit
item.description: added Canada VIA Rail trainsрҹҡҶ https://bit.ly/MonTransitVIARailTrains, 267 schedule updatesрҹ”ҒвҖҰ

item.title: Last Month in MonTransit
item.description: getting ready for latest bike sharing data updates, modernizing code architecture, 263 schedule updatesрҹ”ҒвҖҰ

item.title: Last Month in MonTransit
item.description: bug fixes & performance improvements, 236 schedule updatesрҹ”ҒвҖҰ

item.title: Last Month in MonTransit
item.description: bug fixes & performance improvements, 206 schedule updatesрҹ”ҒвҖҰ

item.title: Last Month in MonTransit
item.description: dded transit agencies colorsрҹҹҰрҹҹҘрҹҹ© to Home screen top buttonsвңЁ & in-app ratingsвӯҗ dialogрҹҷҸ, started collecting performanceрҹ’Ё dataрҹ“Ҡ, 286 schedule updatesрҹ”ҒвҖҰ

item.title: Last Month in MonTransit
item.description: improved route short name and вһЎпёҸdirection as well as service alertsв„№пёҸвҡ пёҸ UIвңЁ, updated service alertsвҡ пёҸ for BC Transit busesрҹҡҚ, said goodbyeрҹ‘Ӣ to Android 5 LollipopрҹҚӯ (2014) and Android 6 Marshmallow в¬ң (2015), 251 schedule updatesрҹ”ҒвҖҰ

item.title: Last Month in MonTransit
item.description: started UI improvementsвңЁ , addedрҹҶ• service alertsвҡ пёҸ to Barrie Transit, Brampton Transit, Calgary Transit, Cornwall Transit, ETS, GRT, MiWay, StAT, Strathcona County, 276 schedule updatesрҹ”ҒвҖҰ
